finding: Single justfile front door; default recipe = `just --list`; check/fft compose the quality verbs
CI = lint/build/typecheck/test→gate(alls-green); typecheck is root-tsc only (narrower than local per-workspace loop)
No pre-commit gate of any kind (no husky/lefthook/pre-commit/lint-staged); .git/hooks only *.sample; core.hooksPath unset
Node 20.19.0 pinned 3 ways; pnpm@9.15.4; committed lockfile; Docker image pins toolchain + bakes Chromium
Auth fully bypassable for local/headless (DISABLE_GITHUB_OAUTH→fake session); Docker sets DISABLE_AUTH=true
Every external/agent dep has a Fake in createTestContainer; production CopilotClient(--allow-all-tools) only in production container
No server-DB driver anywhere; session-store.db is driverless sqlite w/ no app coupling; persistence is file-based JSON
streamd: loopback JWT(HS256)-gated WS; headless smoke proves protocol/auth without TCC; LIVE capture needs macOS TCC (host-Mac)
harness-verify catches Turbopack chunking/render errors tsc+vitest miss (Plan 084 FX007): HTTP 2xx + console filter + docker-log ⨯ grep
streamd-smoke builds + runs REAL daemon binary, streams recorded H.264 over authenticated WS headlessly; auth/handshake/frames/displacement/detach/REST/lifecycle
Ports-and-adapters: 22 interfaces + 18 fakes; 42 *.contract.test.ts run the SAME suite vs fake AND real adapter; 13 vi.mock vs 266 Fake importers
Cross-language fixture oracle: Swift tests read the SAME TS-authored JSON (auth vectors, frame-header, messages)
Two test lanes: hermetic unit (vitest.config.ts, 444 tests, fakes, no net, fileParallelism:false) vs e2e (vitest.e2e.config.ts, real CLIs, excluded from default)
fake-streamd is a 3rd protocol impl replaying fixtures on ephemeral :0; records inputLog + received; scriptable race cues; runs with no daemon (Docker-safe)
FakeCentralEventNotifier records every domain event to emittedEvents[] (SSE/notification sink)
Architecture rules are PROSE only — no dependency-cruiser/eslint-boundaries/semgrep; biome recommended-only; access gated only by tsconfig aliases

No complexity/size/dup/dead-code sensors; god files: positional-graph.command.ts 3348L, positional-graph.service.ts 2602L, console-output.adapter.ts 2376L, worknode.service.ts 1979L, browser-client.tsx 1657L
source: wc -l over apps/packages/native; tsconfig (no noUnused flags)

finding: High fan-in: shared 405 importers, workflow 133, positional-graph 60; no real package cycles (shared is a leaf; apparent cycle was doc-comments only)
Compounding loop: wishlist W001-W011→fix tasks (W001/W003/W008 fixed same session); per-run magicWand+difficulties mirrored to docs/retros; 20+ run history; 86 plans; 14 ADRs
5 distinct 'harness' meanings; new .harness/ stamped L0 with empty boot contract; intent to supplant the L3 Docker harness
Root *.md sprawl (23 files); ~14 stale (last touched 2026-03-10); START_HERE.md points at Question-Popper feature docs not the system
TS↔Swift dual-language co-change coupling (088-remote-view + native/streamd + fixtures move together)
Workspace registration only via web UI; GitHub OAuth hand-configured (mitigated by DISABLE_GITHUB_OAUTH)
turbo caches build/test/lint/typecheck; coverage thresholds enforced 50%; 65 files use fake-timers/deterministic IDs; registry-backed streamd-kill avoids cross-worktree kills
CLI agent-execution path hard-requires GH_TOKEN/GITHUB_TOKEN (pre-flight abort); web UI + tests do not
32 Next.js API routes; ~25 cg CLI command groups with --json envelope; MCP tools check_health/wf_compose/phase_*
security-audit (pnpm audit --audit-level=high) exists locally + in fft but absent from CI; swift test/e2e/harness-integration also one-sided (local-only)
Stale runtime artifacts in .chainglass: orphaned terminal-sidecar-*.pids.json + a 0-byte .92323.tmp
REMOTE_VIEW_SERVICE real adapter is a throwing placeholder (Phase 5 pending); contract suite runs only vs the fake today
